title: thelypteris reptans
intro: Thelypteris reptans, also known as the Indian Cinnamon Fern, is a type of fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris reptans include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris reptans include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and grinding the plant's rhizomes and fronds.
